user.title: LG Soundbars Health
user.description: Create connectivity sensors for existing LG Soundbars config entries. No host is entered here; this helper reads the existing LG Soundbars integration config.

abort.already_configured: LG Soundbars Health is already configured.
abort.no_lg_soundbar_entries: No existing LG Soundbars integration entries with a host were found. Configure the LG Soundbars integration first.

init.title: LG Soundbars Health options
init.description: Set how often the LG soundbar TCP health check runs.
